problem id: 3302f383
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  10001100 -> 00100001
  10111011 -> 11111011
  11101000 -> 10111101
  11110010 -> 11010110
  11100110 -> 10000100
  01101110 -> 10110101
  10000011 -> 00011100
  11011000 -> 01111011
  00000100 -> 00010000
  11001110 -> 00100001

query: 10101001
predicted answer: 10110001
